stemHtml: An aircraft is executing a VFR flight in Class B airspace. The controller…

options.a: applies vertical and horizontal separation to other VFR aircraft.
options.b: does not apply separation to other VFR aircraft.
options.c: applies vertical separation only to other VFR aircraft.
options.d: applies separation to other VFR aircraft only if the altitude is below 3000 m AMSL.
